Sustainability features

This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.
Energy efficiency
Conserves energy compared to similar products.
As certified by
EPEAT

EPEAT

EPEAT certifies electronic products based on sustainability impacts across their life cycle including requirements for energy efficiency and end-of-life management. An EPEAT registered product can also meet optional more ambitious criteria including reduction of fluorinated greenhouse gases (F-GHGs). Products meeting 50% - 74% optional criteria are 'Silver' and those meeting 75% or more are 'Gold'.

Learn more about this certification

Certification Level

GOLD
ECOLOGO

ECOLOGO

ECOLOGO certified products are made with materials that reduce environmental impact at one or more stages of their life cycle, from raw materials to end of life. An ECOLOGO certification indicates that a product has met environmental performance standards, which include criteria in some or all of the following categories: materials, energy, manufacturing and operations, health and environment, product performance and use, and product stewardship and innovation. Products are evaluated on the applicable criteria through testing and auditing.

Learn more about this certification

Safer chemicals
Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.

ECOLOGO

ECOLOGO

ECOLOGO certified products are made with materials that reduce environmental impact at one or more stages of their life cycle, from raw materials to end of life. An ECOLOGO certification indicates that a product has met environmental performance standards, which include criteria in some or all of the following categories: materials, energy, manufacturing and operations, health and environment, product performance and use, and product stewardship and innovation. Products are evaluated on the applicable criteria through testing and auditing.

Learn more about this certification

Manufacturing practices
Manufactured using processes that reduce the risk of negative environmental impact.

An ECOLOGO certification indicates that a product has met environmental performance standards, which include criteria in some or all of the following categories: materials, energy, manufacturing and operations, health and environment, product performance and use, and product stewardship and innovation. About this item

  • MULTIPLE TASKS WITH ONE ASK: Streamline your day with an assistant that gets you. Ask it to Google search for a pet-friendly vegan restaurant nearby and text it to your friend— your Galaxy S25 handles multiple tasks with a single ask.¹
  • START THE DAY SMARTER: Stay one step ahead with a phone that gives you the info you need before you even know you need it with Now Brief.²
  • REDUCE THE NOISE. REVEAL THE MAGIC: AI Camera with Audio Eraser lets you capture vibrant videos in low light and minimize unwanted noises so you can relive your favorite moments with fewer distractions.³
  • BRING OUT THE BEST IN EVERY FACE: Capture every portrait with clarity and confidence on the Galaxy S25. The advanced portrait features adjust skin tones and preserve natural textures, giving every shot a polished, professional look.
  • MORE POWER TO YOU: Reimagine what’s possible with the Galaxy S25. featuring our most powerful processor yet. Effortlessly translate your calls, slow down a video, or edit your photos without skipping a beat.
› See more product details

Additional Details

Verified by Transparency
The brand applies a unique Transparency code to each item. We verify this code before shipping. You can verify this code using the Amazon Shopping app to confirm it comes from the brand and view additional product details.

Reviews
Samsung Galaxy S25 Cell Phone, 128GB Smartphone, Unlocked Android, AI Night Mode Camera, Snapdragon 8 Elite Fast Processor, ProScaler Display, 4000mAh Battery, 2025, US 1 Yr Warranty, Icyblue

Product Description

Imagine a phone that truly streamlines your everyday. Galaxy S25 Series does more than keep your world in one place — it uses AI¹⁰ to put your own intuitive personal assistant in the palm of your hand.

¹Compatible with select apps. Requires Google Gemini account. Results may vary based on input; check responses for accuracy. ²Displays daily select information from select apps (some apps may require internet connection). ³Compatible with common video formats accessible in Gallery; helps minimize six sounds (Voice/speech, Music, Noise, Crowd, Nature, Wind). Utilizes AI; results vary. ⁴As compared to Galaxy S24 Ultra. ⁶Galaxy AI features track data and requires a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account.⁹Galaxy AI features track data and require a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ¹⁰Galaxy Al basic features provided by Samsung are free. Any Samsung enhanced Al features and all third-party Al features are subject to different terms and may be subject to fees. (Galaxy Al basic features are listed under "Advanced intelligence" in Samsung Services Terms and Conditions.).

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

    Customers say

    Customers find this phone to be a nice Android device with good camera quality that takes beautifully clear images, and appreciate its superb battery life, speed, and value for money. The phone's functionality receives mixed reviews - while some say it works well, others report issues with newer apps not working properly. Customers disagree on the phone's size, with some finding it perfect for small hands while others consider it too small.
    AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

    Select to learn more

    85 customers mention phone quality, 78 positive, 7 negative85 customers mention "Phone quality"78 positive7 negative
    Customers find the phone to be of good quality, describing it as one of the nicest Android phones available, with one customer noting it performs better than the S22 Plus.
    "It is a great phone, came perfect condition. Great value in my opinion awsome camera all around really good Edit 1 year later,..." Read more
    "Good phone, seems well built, apps are all now working, I have 5G and Satellite but it's not really a worthy successor to my good old indestructible..." Read more
    "Nice phone. I hope it lasts me 7 years. Phones are getting so expensive. Change from another Galaxy was easy with their SmartSwitch app." Read more
    "...They look sleek and very nice!! They are fast and I don't have any issues with lag or anything like that." Read more
    34 customers mention camera quality, 28 positive, 6 negative34 customers mention "Camera quality"28 positive6 negative
    Customers praise the phone's camera, noting that it takes beautifully clear images and produces super photos and videos.
    "...Battery life for me is about 3 days. Clear screens, fast, and great camera. I am very happy that I chose this." Read more
    "...The camera is great the screen is fast and looks great. The battery last for a good amount of time. I have no complaints for this phone itself...." Read more
    "I upgraded from an S21, and dang this phone is nice! Better camera, better speakers, sharper screen. It's very, very snappy...." Read more
    "Good - beautiful screen. Blazing fast. Amazing camera. Looks great. Same as the 21,22,23,24 Bad - palm rejection is terrible...." Read more
    30 customers mention battery life, 21 positive, 9 negative30 customers mention "Battery life"21 positive9 negative
    Customers are satisfied with the phone's battery life, with one customer noting that it charges super quickly.
    "This phone is great! The battery life, efficiency when charging, and hand feel...." Read more
    "...from the touch screen, clear images, good sound quality, and great battery life...." Read more
    "Do not purchase the battery is poor. Samsung is not good quality compared to iPhone. Bought by mistake and never purchasing from Samsung again." Read more
    "...Fast, lightweight, great color. Peak Android experience. Battery life is decent, lasts a day if you don't use it often. Screen looks good" Read more
    22 customers mention value for money, 17 positive, 5 negative22 customers mention "Value for money"17 positive5 negative
    Customers find the phone to be a great value, with one mentioning it offers amazing quality for the money.
    "Moved from an s20+, so this thing is amazing to me! Great price, no bloatware from the carrier, works on Verizon network." Read more
    "It is a great phone, came perfect condition. Great value in my opinion awsome camera all around really good Edit 1 year later,..." Read more
    "...if you're someone that wants a small powerful compact phone at good price!" Read more
    "...Pretty unhappy, since this is the most expensive phone I have ever had" Read more
    20 customers mention speed, 19 positive, 1 negative20 customers mention "Speed"19 positive1 negative
    Customers praise the phone's speed and responsiveness, with one customer noting that all apps load instantly.
    "Amazing phone. Fast, lightweight, great color. Peak Android experience. Battery life is decent, lasts a day if you don't use it often...." Read more
    "Arrived on time and as described, no issues and the phone is very fast." Read more
    "...GalaxyAI and Gemini. The phone is super fast and not laggy. I'm satisfied with my purchase." Read more
    "...Better camera, better speakers, sharper screen. It's very, very snappy. But the S21 was fast too...." Read more
    54 customers mention functionality, 36 positive, 18 negative54 customers mention "Functionality"36 positive18 negative
    Customers have mixed experiences with the phone's functionality, with some reporting it works well and has no problems, while others mention that newer apps stop working.
    "Perfect condition, unlocked and works great" Read more
    "The phone didn't work. Loaded all my information into it then it completely shut down on me, with an error saying the phone was stolen." Read more
    "Best Phone yet the size is great love the functionality. Easy to change the brightness" Read more
    "The phone works great and was in perfect condition. The delivery was just as expected. Great experience." Read more
    32 customers mention size, 21 positive, 11 negative32 customers mention "Size"21 positive11 negative
    Customers have mixed opinions about the phone's size, with some finding it handy and perfect for small hands, while others consider it a bit small.
    "Very capable cell phone for an older gentleman. Well made. Perfect size. More than enough memory. Price was good. Bought on Amazon special offer." Read more
    "Too small, i wanted a larger phone" Read more
    "Before this purchased i had a S20fe. This is smaller and fits better in a pocket. Features are good, good sound, reception. Pictures are sharp." Read more
    "...I like that it has a nice large display, while also being compact enough to use with one hand...." Read more

    About this Item

    • MULTIPLE TASKS WITH ONE ASK: Streamline your day with an assistant that gets you. Ask it to Google search for a pet-friendly vegan restaurant nearby and text it to your friend— your Galaxy S25 handles multiple tasks with a single ask.¹
    • START THE DAY SMARTER: Stay one step ahead with a phone that gives you the info you need before you even know you need it with Now Brief.²
    • REDUCE THE NOISE. REVEAL THE MAGIC: AI Camera with Audio Eraser lets you capture vibrant videos in low light and minimize unwanted noises so you can relive your favorite moments with fewer distractions.³
    • BRING OUT THE BEST IN EVERY FACE: Capture every portrait with clarity and confidence on the Galaxy S25. The advanced portrait features adjust skin tones and preserve natural textures, giving every shot a polished, professional look.
    • MORE POWER TO YOU: Reimagine what’s possible with the Galaxy S25. featuring our most powerful processor yet. Effortlessly translate your calls, slow down a video, or edit your photos without skipping a beat.

    Product Description

    Imagine a phone that truly streamlines your everyday. Galaxy S25 Series does more than keep your world in one place — it uses AI¹⁰ to put your own intuitive personal assistant in the palm of your hand.

    ¹Compatible with select apps. Requires Google Gemini account. Results may vary based on input; check responses for accuracy. ²Displays daily select information from select apps (some apps may require internet connection). ³Compatible with common video formats accessible in Gallery; helps minimize six sounds (Voice/speech, Music, Noise, Crowd, Nature, Wind). Utilizes AI; results vary. ⁴As compared to Galaxy S24 Ultra. ⁶Galaxy AI features track data and requires a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account.⁹Galaxy AI features track data and require a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ¹⁰Galaxy Al basic features provided by Samsung are free. Any Samsung enhanced Al features and all third-party Al features are subject to different terms and may be subject to fees. (Galaxy Al basic features are listed under "Advanced intelligence" in Samsung Services Terms and Conditions.).
